content.rendered:
Join one of India’s leading eye care institutions — Giridhar Eye Institute, Kochi — recognized for excellence in ophthalmic care, education, and research for over 28 years.
We are looking for an experienced Glaucoma Specialist with proven expertise in managing complex and high-risk glaucoma cases. The ideal candidate should have strong clinical and surgical experience and a commitment to delivering world-class patient care.
Requirements:
🔹 Minimum 5 years of post-specialisation experience in a reputed institution
🔹 Proven expertise in handling complex and high-risk glaucoma cases
🔹 Extensive hands-on experience in performing glaucoma diagnostic tests and surgical procedures

Interested candidates may send their detailed resume with a recent photograph to:
📧 giridhareye@gmail.com


📍 Giridhar Eye Institute
55/3225 B Ponneth Temple Road, Kadavanthra,
Cochin – 682020, Kerala


📞 +91 81293 11899 | 0484 4170000 Ext. 1351
